title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
